description_long: This is a large, semi-circular wheel of cheese with a pale yellow to light beige color and a hard, slightly rough rind. The side of the cheese features embossed or engraved lettering, suggesting it is a traditional or artisanal variety, possibly a hard cheese like Parmigiano-Reggiano or Grana Padano. The cut face of the cheese is smooth and dense, with a few small holes or eyes visible, indicating a firm, aged texture. The rind appears thick and natural, with a matte, slightly powdery finish. The cheese is unwrapped and shows no visible packaging, resting directly on a neutral, flat surface. Its substantial size and solid form make it suitable for slicing or grating in an urban food market or street vendor context.
description: A large, semi-circular wheel of hard, pale yellow cheese with a thick, rough rind and engraved lettering on the side. The cut face is smooth and dense with a few small holes.
description_view_0: The front view shows the semi-circular shape, thick rind, and prominent engraved lettering along the curved side.
description_view_1: This angled view highlights the thickness of the cheese and the continuation of the engraved text, with the cut face visible.
description_view_2: The back view displays the flat, cut face of the cheese, revealing a smooth, dense interior with a few small holes and a straight edge.
description_view_3: This side view emphasizes the thickness and texture of the rind, with the smooth, pale top surface visible.
attribute_rind_appearance: The rind is thick, hard, and rough with a pale yellow to beige color and a matte, slightly powdery finish.
